title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Robin, Unknown person #13, Kinemon, Unknown person #14, Roger, Whitebeard Pirates as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: We found it! The last road poneglyph!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wow!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: That's the Kozuki clan's seal!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This means we're sworn Brothers with the Minks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Please take me with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Your name is Pedro, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I like your spirit, but it isn't your TIME yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your time to "shine" has yet to come!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: When will my "time" come?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll know when it happens! Help us then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Alright! I'll definitely help later!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so, we finally assembled the 4 road poneglyphs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only thing that was left was... "The final island"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: at an unknown harbour

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: *Cough* *Cough* *cough*

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Roger!! Are you alright!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Click...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright boys, have we figured out our destination yet!?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard Pirates
dialogue.text: Yes, we did captain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: When shall we leave!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Right now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was it luck? If so, good or bad?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Suddenly, buggy-Jiro came down with a high fever as we approached the last island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Noooo, I was so close!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Please take me with you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently, it's called the "you'll-die-if- you-go-to- that-island" disease.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I want to see it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did he have to catch such a disease right before the finishing line!?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Don't worry about buggy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day, we'll sail there with our own ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Breaking news! No, actually, big news! The biggest news!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gold Roger, has finally answered the unanswered mystery of the world! He conquered the grand line!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has success- fully sailed across every single ocean. There is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm not

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: He is the King of the Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: On that fateful day,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had learned about everything in the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We learned about the "Void century". We learned about the "meaning of the D. Name". We learned about the "ancient weapons".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I, at least, learned that Wano had connected with the world in the past

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But do you want to know what gold D. Roger, King of the Pirates, did when the treasure he sought was placed in front of his very eyes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He laughed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We laughed as well,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to the point: where tears started pouring out of our eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Joy boy, I...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You left behind such an unbelievable treasure...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I really wish I had been born in the same era as you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What a funny story!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hey guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How about we name this "last island" that no one arrived at yet,

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: "Laugh Tale"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and beyond the further ends of it all

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
